title: Frontend Batch 25 - Admin Editor Save Failure Sanitization Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced admin Blog, Page, and Work editor save failure messages so technical backend details are not shown to users while input state remains intact.
behaviorBugsFound: Blog editor save failures could show raw SQL/status/stack/provider details.
Page editor save failure toasts could show raw SQL/status/stack/provider details.
Work editor save failures could show raw SQL/status/stack/provider details.

validation.command: npx skills find react form editor save failure testing

remainingGaps: Upload/video-specific failure messages can still be audited separately.
Autosave-specific Blog Notion failure sanitization remains separate from standard editor save paths.
Success/redirect return-path behavior was not changed.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 26 - Admin Upload Failure Sanitization Reinforcement.
